description_long: This is a large, ornate stone fountain featuring a sculptural group of two human figures in a dynamic pose, possibly depicting a historical or mythological scene. The figures are mounted atop a rectangular pedestal, which sits at the center of an octagonal basin. The basin is surrounded by a wide, raised rim and is set into a square paved platform, with some debris and weathering visible around the edges. The stonework is detailed, with the figures showing expressive gestures and draped clothing, and the overall structure exudes a sense of permanence and artistry. The fountain appears to be made primarily of carved stone, with no visible water present in the basin or jets. The setting suggests it is intended as a public monument or decorative feature in an urban plaza or park.
description: A large, detailed stone fountain with two sculpted human figures atop an octagonal basin, set on a paved platform. The fountain is richly ornamented and appears as a public monument.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two sculpted figures in full detail, with the octagonal basin and paved platform clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the figures and the depth of the basin, with less detail visible on the sculptures.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the figures and the geometric shape of the basin, emphasizing the fountain's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side of the figures, with the basin's structure and platform visible.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with two intricately sculpted human figures in a dramatic pose, featuring detailed drapery and expressive gestures. The pedestal and basin are plain but robust, emphasizing the artistry of the central sculpture.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal, large, and deep, with a wide, raised rim and a central pedestal supporting the sculptures. There are no visible tiers or compartments.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a square paved platform with some scattered debris and weathering, but no visible landscaping or additional features.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the fountain.
